data.title: KBRA Assigns AA+ Rating to the City of New York Taxable General Obligation Bonds, Fiscal 2026 Series H, Subseries H-1; Outlook Negative
data.description: In a recent assessment, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned a AA+ long-term rating to the City of New York Taxable General Obligation Bonds, Fiscal 2026 Series H, Subseries H-1. The agency also affirmed a AA+ long-term rating with a Negative Outlook on existing City of New York General Obligation Bonds. This rating reflects the city's significance as a global business and cultural hub within the largest metropolitan economy in the United States. The Negative Outlook signifies some concerns in the city's financial landscape.

data.title: Scotland Brings Tartan Taxis to Manhattan for NYC Tartan Week
data.description: This week, New York is hosting Scotland as part of NYC Tartan Week, featuring tartan taxis cruising around Manhattan. VisitScotland is actively promoting Scotland in its primary international market through this initiative.

data.title: University of Phoenix to Host Webinar on AI Skills, Education and Workforce Access
data.description: A webinar taking place in Phoenix on April 9, 2026, will focus on how leaders can effectively integrate artificial intelligence (AI) into their organizations while ensuring workforce preparedness and talent development. The University of Phoenix will be hosting the event, which will delve into the importance of aligning AI adoption with education, access, and overall readiness of the workforce. This webinar aims to address the critical need for leaders to strategize and plan for AI implementation while considering the skills and training required for employees to thrive in this evolving technological landscape. Attendees can anticipate gaining valuable insights on navigating the intersection of AI and workforce development, contributing to a holistic approach towards leveraging new technologies in the professional realm.

data.title: Pepe might hit Wall Street like Dogecoin, but ETFs show minimal interest amidst meme hype frenzy. CoinShares' Butterfill notes lukewarm Dogecoin inflows.
data.description: James Butterfill from CoinShares reported that there has been lukewarm interest in Dogecoin funds, with Pepe ETF application now available.

data.title: KBRA Assigns AAA Rating to Various San Diego Unified School Districts GO Bonds; Affirms Rating for Outstanding GO Bonds
data.description: KBRA has awarded a top-notch AAA long-term rating to the San Diego Unified School District for their 2026 General Obligation Refunding Bonds. This includes the following series: Election of 1998, Series R-9; Election of 2008, Series SR-6A; and Election of 2008, Series SR-6B. This rating reflects the district's strong ability to meet its financial commitments, indicating a low credit risk for investors. It demonstrates the district's stable financial outlook and solid management, providing assurance to investors and stakeholders.

data.title: M-tron Industries, Inc. Announces Extension of Previously Announced Rights Offering
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on April 9, 2026, M-tron Industries, Inc. extended the expiration of its rights offering to buy shares of the company's common stock valued at $0.01 per share. The company, listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbols MPTI and MPTI RT, made the announcement.
